title: Fix run --hostname test that started failing post-merge
body: As the title says. Split the relevant code into a new test, so we can be sure this is the case if the test fails, and remove some logic that doesn't make sense (we cannot expect container IP to change across runs - that's expecting a lot out of CNI that we don't want to depend on)

comments.body: Tests seem fixed. @baude want to drop an LGTM?

Hoping that timeout is just papr flaking.
It looks network-related. I think it's safe to blame papr.
